name: luscious-honey-hq
description: Luscious Honey Collective — Headquarters. Production Sprint 01 vertical slice: Arrival → Front Desk → Long Corridor → Publishing Wing → one editorial reader. Built from Sprint 04 (Lock the House) as the canonical source of truth.

scripts.test: node --test tests/logic.test.ts tests/governance.test.ts tests/office.test.ts tests/access.test.mjs tests/guestbook.test.mjs tests/headquarters.test.ts tests/briefing.test.mjs tests/operations.test.ts tests/creative.test.ts tests/production.test.ts tests/growth.test.ts tests/business.test.ts tests/living-systems.test.ts tests/chief-of-staff.test.ts tests/executive-register.test.ts tests/executive-integration.test.ts tests/chief-of-staff-ops.test.ts tests/collaboration.test.ts tests/brokerage.test.ts tests/growth-intelligence.test.ts tests/content-opportunity.test.ts tests/creative-assignment.test.ts tests/creative-draft.test.ts tests/draft-provider.test.mjs tests/production-readiness.test.ts tests/executive-work-queue.test.ts tests/executive-attention.test.ts tests/executive-memory.test.ts tests/invitation.test.mjs tests/submission-types.test.mjs tests/creative-matter.test.ts tests/executive-context.test.ts tests/executive-judgment.test.ts tests/executive-workflow.test.ts tests/founder-attention.test.ts tests/institutional-memory.test.ts tests/headquarters-os.test.ts tests/executive-loop.test.ts tests/execution-bridge.test.ts tests/execution-runtime.test.ts tests/institutional-loop.test.ts tests/notifications.test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm test && npm run check:prod
scripts.deploy: npm run verify && wrangler pages deploy
